events: 1. "Discovered harboring a wanted Wizard Tower mage in the Hollows. The Iron Fang Consortium offers a bounty on their head, endangering all associated."
2. "Stumbles upon an ancient Ash Warren ritual site. The Wardens of Ash, alerted by the Rift activity, demand an explanation and threaten retribution."
3. "Obtained a rare Ashen Scroll detailing a lost Serpent Choir artifact. The Guild of Ashen Scrolls demands its return, but the Adventurers Guild sees a lucrative opportunity."
4. "Overhears a plot to assassinate a high-ranking Patchwork Saints member in the Glass Quarter. Caught in the crossfire, they must navigate treacherous alliances."
5. "Rumors of a haunting spread after a ghostly apparition appears during a midnight raid on the Tower Authority. The Adventurers Guild offers a high price for proof."
